title: Hiro's Animal Friends Love Food
synopsis: Little Hiro discovers what his animal friends love to eat, from bananas for monkeys to fish for cats, in a delightful food adventure.

pages.text: Hiro loves food! He sees a monkey. What does monkey eat?

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face stands next to a friendly brown monkey holding a bright yellow banana with sparkles and steam rising from it in magical swirls

pages.text: Banana! Yellow banana! Monkey is happy. Yummy banana!

illustration.description: The monkey eating an exaggerated large golden banana with drips of sweet juice and magical sparkles while Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face claps his hands in delight

pages.text: Hiro sees a cat. What does cat eat? Fish! Orange fish!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face watches a fluffy gray cat with a perfectly grilled orange fish surrounded by steam and sparkles on a colorful plate

pages.text: Cat loves fish. Hiro sees a rabbit. Rabbit loves carrots!

illustration.description: A white bunny rabbit munching on exaggerated large orange carrots with green leafy tops while Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sits nearby watching with joy and magical food sparkles floating around

pages.text: Orange carrots! Crunch crunch! Hiro loves animals. Animals love food!

illustration.description: A feast celebration scene with Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face surrounded by the monkey with banana, cat with fish, and rabbit with carrots, all with magical steam and sparkles creating a joyful food party atmosphere
illustration.alt: Hiro with all animal friends and their foods

pages.text: Hiro is hungry too. Time to eat! Yummy food for everyone!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting at a magical table filled with diverse appetizing foods from different cuisines with steam rising and sparkles dancing around the delicious feast

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does the monkey eat?
questions.explanation: The monkey loves to eat yellow bananas!

questions.question: What does the cat eat?
questions.explanation: The cat loves to eat orange fish!

questions.question: What does the rabbit eat?
questions.explanation: The rabbit loves to eat orange carrots!
